summary: Backend: 16/16 tests PASS (products, auth, admin RBAC, checkout create, orders/mine). Frontend: Home, Catalog (12 products), Login (admin), Admin panel dashboard all load & work. Register route and /cart route NOT MATCHED (404 routes). Checkout status endpoint returns 500 from Stripe (integration issue).

critical.issue: Returns 500 'No such checkout.session' immediately after creating session with emergentintegrations Stripe. Checkout creation OK but status retrieval fails with CheckoutError. May be emergent Stripe test-key limitation.

ui_bugs.issue: /register route not defined (No routes matched location '/register'). Login page shows 'Ingresar' button only, no link to register page visible.
/cart route not defined (No routes matched). The header cart icon likely uses different path. Need to verify actual cart path (e.g. /carrito).
Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height -1 warnings - charts render in 0-size container when no data. Add minHeight to chart wrapper.

integration_issues.issue: When guest visits protected route, header shows 401s in console but flow works. Admin login redirected to / instead of /admin - acceptable.

issues: Charts area empty with 'Ventas por día' and 'Top productos' - no placeholder/empty state shown

action_items: Fix register route: ensure App.js has <Route path='/register'> for RegisterPage. Currently users cannot register via UI.
Fix cart route: verify path (likely /carrito in Spanish) matches Link/navigate targets in CartContext/header.

Investigate /api/orders/status/ 500 - emergentintegrations 'No such checkout.session' right after creation. May need to use live Stripe key or handle CheckoutError gracefully returning pending status.
Admin dashboard charts: handle empty data state and fix 0-size container warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py on_event startup/shutdown deprecated - migrate to lifespan
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per spec; browsers reject. Should set explicit origins via CORS_ORIGINS env
set_auth_cookie uses samesite='none' + secure=True - OK for cross-site; fine
seed_admin updates password hash when env password changes - good idempotent behavior
order_status does not handle Stripe CheckoutError - bubbles 500. Should catch and return pending/error
test_credentials: Admin: admin@mundoinfantil.com / admin123 (works). Customer: created dynamically via register API (works).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover all endpoints. Frontend register and cart routes appear missing/misnamed - verify App.js routes match the actual paths used in Link/navigate. After fixes, retest full purchase flow.
